title: Production Test Data Management (owner sandbox records)
description: Owner-controlled sandbox/test records in production data: create + clearly mark + purge disposable test bookings so an owner can exercise flows against prod without polluting real analytics.

verification.summary: PR #8 bundle re-verified against head da5fdc8: tsc 0 errors; eslint changed-files 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite 462/462; test:ai 117/117; ai-regression 2/2; next build ✓ compiled successfully; all new flags default OFF (flag-off = byte-identical). GitHub Vercel + regression green on merge commit a8e0584.

knownDifferences: Owner-gated; test records are explicitly flagged and excluded from customer analytics.

rollbackSteps: Rollback: git revert -m 1 a8e0584ff0ef390a4baf6cda8ebdd4bed6885aac (the PR #8 merge). Additive owner tooling; purge any created test records.
compatibilityNotes: Owner-only sandbox records; guarded so test data never enters real KPIs.

history.note: Registered retroactively: the Production Test Data Management commit (add75ad) shipped in PR #8 without a manifest — recorded here to close the unregistered-parity-commit drift.
